source_pr.title: planner: reset recorded cte plan in plan encoder
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/25174

Problem Summary:

planner encoder does not reset the recorded cte plan lead data race

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- reset recorded cte plan in plan encoder<!-- Please write a release note here to describe the change you made when it is released to the users of TiDB. If your PR doesn't involve any change to TiDB(like test enhancements, RFC proposals...), you can write `No release note`. -->

root_cause_explanation: The plan encoder kept recorded CTE plan state across calls, causing a data race when used concurrently. The fix resets the recorded slice (`pn.ctes = pn.ctes[:0]`) so encoding does not reuse shared mutable state across goroutines.
fix_pattern: Reset recorded CTE plan state in the plan encoder (`pn.ctes = pn.ctes[:0]`) to avoid concurrent reuse of shared mutable state.

evidence: evidence: fix encode cte plan race

analysis:
